title: Design feedback
content: The layout and design are well thought out. Great work!

title: Feature suggestion
content: Would love to see enhanced analytics features in the dashboard.

title: Performance feedback
content: The app loads quickly and feels responsive.

title: User experience
content: Navigation is intuitive and easy to understand.

title: General feedback
content: Clean interface. Overall a solid experience.

title: Security note
content: Appreciate the focus on privacy and secure messaging.

title: Improvement idea
content: Could benefit from bulk message export feature.

title: Documentation
content: Helpful documentation. Easy to get started.

title: Feature request
content: Message filtering and search would be useful.
